attempt_summary.project_head_normalizer: Attempted but not applied. Tilda CodeMirror did not reliably accept programmatic insertion; live HTML after publish did not contain the `moonn-link-normalizer` marker.
attempt_summary.publish_all: Tilda publish-all was run after the attempted project-head change; live HTML check confirmed the normalizer was not present, so this did not create the intended sitewide fix.
attempt_summary.next_safe_action: Apply content-level edits to the affected Tilda source blocks using the generated page_id/record_id location registry, starting with homepage P0 block `rec2175794871`.

fixes.reason: This exact value likely produced the GSC internalized WhatsApp 404.
Use HTTPS for all WhatsApp links and keep one canonical format.
Typo in internal domain links; this can create broken or suspicious outbound behavior.

implementation_note: These are Tilda block-level content fixes. They cannot be completed through the documented read/export Tilda API; apply in the Tilda editor or via a validated UI automation path.
